data.title: Campaign urges men to voice concerns and get checked for prostate & urological health issues. Prostate cancer a common threat.
data.description: On September 19, 2025, in New York, a report highlighted the persistent stigma hindering discussions on prostate and urological health among men, potentially leading to fatal consequences. Prostate cancer stands out as a prevalent cancer in men, with significant numbers affected worldwide. Challenges such as urinary incontinence and erectile dysfunction further compound these health concerns, emphasizing the need for open dialogue and proactive medical attention among men's health advocates.

data.title: ASA Gold and Precious Metals Limited (NYSE: ASA) declares $0.03/share distribution, payable Nov 19, 2025. Company paid distributions since 1959.
data.description: Portland, Maine - ASA Gold and Precious Metals Limited (NYSE: ASA) has announced a distribution of $0.03 per common share, payable on November 19, 2025, to shareholders of record as of November 12, 2025. The company has a history of uninterrupted distributions since 1959. ASA is a non-diversified, closed-end fund focused on long-term capital growth by investing in companies related to gold and precious metals.

data.title: Cryptocurrency prices dip as traders lock profits, with Bitcoin at $116,569.36, Ethereum at $4,532.32, XRP at $3.03, and Dogecoin at $0.2737. 102,639 traders liquidated.
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are experiencing a pullback this Friday morning, with traders taking profits after Bitcoin's recent rally. The current prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $116,569.36, Ethereum at $4,532.32, Solana at $242.50, XRP at $3.03, Dogecoin at $0.2737, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001311. According to Coinglass data, 102,639 traders have been liquidated recently. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
